headline: Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR) Offers Dividend Sustainability and Profitability
summary: Pentair (PNR) offers a sustainable 1.48% dividend with a low 24.91% payout ratio, strong profitability ratings, and a fair P/E of 14.43, making it a solid choice for disciplined dividend investors.
